texto: You rock a sobbing child without wondering if today's world is passing you by, because you know you hold tomorrow in your arms.
explicacao: Citação de Neil A. Maxwell sobre temas ligados a tempo. “You rock a sobbing child without wondering if today's world is passing you by, because you know y…” articula tempo, parenting, reflexao em registro de tempo, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.

frase_original: You rock a sobbing child without wondering if today's world is passing you by, because you know you hold tomorrow in your arms.

texto: When we are impatient, we are neither reverential nor reflective because we are too self-centered. Whereas faith and patience are companions, so are selfishness and impatience. It is so easy to be confrontive without being informative; so easy to be indignant without being intelligent; so easy to be impulsive without being insightful. It is so easy to command others when we are not in control of ourselves.
explicacao: Citação de Neil A. Maxwell sobre temas ligados a fe. “When we are impatient, we are neither reverential nor reflective because we are too self-centered…” articula fe, patience, self-control em registro de fe, com relevância para contextos como self-control.

frase_original: When we are impatient, we are neither reverential nor reflective because we are too self-centered. Whereas faith and patience are companions, so are selfishness and impatience. It is so easy to be confrontive without being informative; so easy to be indignant without being intelligent; so easy to be impulsive without being insightful. It is so easy to command others when we are not in control of ourselves.
